data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the 'Default values' requirement, but the linked use case does not provide any evidence of default values being implemented for the custom fields. The evidence only details the types of fields created but lacks any mention of default values, which is a critical aspect of the requirement. This indicates a clear gap in the coverage of the requirement as specified.
gaps: No evidence of default values for custom fields.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
